ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Steneberg for Wells Fargo Bank. Stephanie Wald of the Attorney General's Office.

Ms. Steneberg stated that Ms. Aminy did not execute a power of appointment and confirmed the names of the Ms. Aminy's parents as Mohd and Nasreen Aminy. The parties presented argument to support their positions. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. McDaniels.

Petition To Approve 1st Account And Report Of Trustee, For Confirmation Of Trustee'S Fees, Approval Of Final Expenses, Reimbursement Of Medi-Cal Lien
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Steneberg for Petitioner: Wells Fargo Bank.

The Court raised the issue regarding the amount of fees requested. Ms. Steneberg stated that the fees requested were within the cap of the trust assets, provided detatil of the services rendered and stated that it was justified and reasonable. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
